testcase.name: test_apply_all_bulk_no_body

failure.message:
AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase40_term_audit_bulk.py:123: in test_apply_all_bulk_no_body assert r.status_code == 200, r.text[:300] E AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
